serviceDescription: Amazon Location Service provides affordable data, tracking and geofencing capabilities, and native integrations with AWS services, so you can create sophisticated location-enabled applications quickly, without the high cost of custom development.

serviceSelector.title: Select Location service(s) that you want to estimate
serviceSelector.description: Select one or more Location features depending on your application. Please note your pricing estimate depends on architectural decisions such as how often you choose to update device positions when using trackers.
serviceSelector.infoDescription: Amazon Location Service provides affordable data, tracking and geofencing capabilities, and native integrations with AWS services, so you can create sophisticated location-enabled applications quickly, without the high cost of custom development.
